case_title: VICTOR MENESES WIDMER VS. PG & E CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY WIDMER, VICTOR MENESES AS TO DEFENDANT PG & E CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PG & E CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2018 BY PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. PLAINTIFF VICTOR WIDMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PG&E CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RICKY HARRIS, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIDMER, VICTOR MENESES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PG & E CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIDMER, VICTOR MENESES AS TO DEFENDANT PG & E CORPORATION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY WIDMER, VICTOR MENESES PG & E CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (MAILED TO:LINDA CHENG - PG&E OFFICE)**SEE GREEN CARD** SERVED MAR-19-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PG & E CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
